revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Hotel]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Hotel | title = Tourist accommodations, [[lodging]] and [[hotel]]s | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist
| group1 = General | list1 = * [[Hotel design]] * [[Hotel detective]] * [[Hotel manager]] * [[Hotel rating]] * [[Suite (hotel)|Hotel suite]] ** [[Honeymoon suite (hotel)|Honeymoon]] ** [[Presidential suite|Presidential]] * [[Hotel television systems]] * [[Hotel thief]] * [[Room service]]
| group2 = Types | list2 = * [[Apartment hotel]] * [[Bed and breakfast]] * [[Boutique hotel]] * [[Capsule hotel]] * [[Caravanserai]] * [[Casino hotel]] * [[Choultry]] * [[Condo hotel]] * [[Eco hotel]] * [[Gasthaus]] * [[Hostel]] * [[Hotel barge]] * [[Hotel garni]] * [[Hotelship]] * [[Ice hotel]] * [[Inn]] * [[Love hotel]] * [[Motel]] * [[Palace (hotel)|Palace hotel]] * [[Patient hotel]] * [[Pension (lodging)]] * [[Pension hotel]] * [[Pop-up hotel]] * [[Resort hotel]] * [[Roadhouse (premises)|Roadhouse]] * [[Ryokan]] * [[Stopping house]] * [[Transit hotel]] * [[Turbaza]] * [[Riad (architecture)|Riad]]
| group3 = Lists | list3 = * [[List of casino hotels|Casino hotels]] * [[List of chained-brand hotels|Chained-brand hotels]] * [[List of defunct hotel chains|Defunct hotel chains]] * [[List of lists of hotels|Hotels]] * [[List of largest hotels|Largest hotels]] * [[List of motels|Motels]] * [[List of tallest hotels|Tallest hotels]]
| group4 = Related | list4 = * [[Coaching inn]] * [[Mountain hut]] * [[Pub]] * [[Tavern]]
|below = *{{icon|category}} [[:Category:Tourist accommodations]] * {{icon|category}} [[:Category:Hotels]] * {{portal-inline|size=tiny|Hotels}}
}}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Hotel navigational boxes| ]] </noinclude>

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hotel here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hotel for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox | name = Hotel | title = Tourist accommodations, [[lodging]] and [[hotel]]s | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist
| group1 = General | list1 = * [[Hotel design]] * [[Hotel detective]] * [[Hotel manager]] * [[Hotel rating]] * [[Suite (hotel)|Hotel suite]] ** [[Honeymoon suite (hotel)|Honeymoon]] ** [[Presidential suite|Presidential]] * [[Hotel television systems]] * [[Hotel thief]] * [[Room service]]
| group2 = Types | list2 = * [[:en:Apartment hotel|Apartment hotel]] * [[:en:Bed and breakfast|Bed and breakfast]] * [[:en:Boutique hotel|Boutique hotel]] * [[:en:Capsule hotel|Capsule hotel]] * [[:en:Caravanserai|Caravanserai]] * [[:en:Casino hotel|Casino hotel]] * [[Choultry]] * [[Condo hotel]] * [[Eco hotel]] * [[Gasthaus]] * [[Hostel]] * [[Hotel barge]] * [[Hotel garni]] * [[Hotelship]] * [[Ice hotel]] * [[:en:Inn|Inn]] * [[Love hotel]] * [[Motel]] * [[Palace (hotel)|Palace hotel]] * [[Patient hotel]] * [[Pension (lodging)]] * [[Pension hotel]] * [[Pop-up hotel]] * [[Resort hotel]] * [[Roadhouse (premises)|Roadhouse]] * [[:en:Ryokan|Ryokan]] * [[Stopping house]] * [[Transit hotel]] * [[Turbaza]] * [[Riad (architecture)|Riad]]
| group3 = Lists | list3 = * [[List of casino hotels|Casino hotels]] * [[List of chained-brand hotels|Chained-brand hotels]] * [[List of defunct hotel chains|Defunct hotel chains]] * [[List of lists of hotels|Hotels]] * [[List of largest hotels|Largest hotels]] * [[List of motels|Motels]] * [[List of tallest hotels|Tallest hotels]]
| group4 = Related | list4 = * [[Coaching inn]] * [[:en:Mountain hut|Mountain hut]] * [[:en:Pub|Pub]] * [[Tavern]]
|below = *{{icon|category}} [[:Category:Tourist accommodations]] * {{icon|category}} [[:Category:Hotels]] * {{portal-inline|size=tiny|Hotels}}
}}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}}
